market_summary: Highly volatile week dominated by US-Iran ceasefire fragility (Strait of Hormuz crisis since Feb 28), KelpDAO $292M DeFi exploit (largest of 2026), and gold reaching all-time highs near $4,820. Oil swung wildly between $84-128/bbl. BTC consolidated at $75-76K with healthy on-chain metrics (MVRV 1.37, SOPR 1.00). Silver failed $83 breakout, pulled back to $79.84.
key_events_tomorrow: US-Iran ceasefire tensions — ships seized Apr 20, renewed violence. Oil likely volatile at open.
KelpDAO exploit aftermath — watch for further DeFi contagion, AAVE frozen markets, ETH selling pressure
No major US economic releases scheduled for April 21 (Easter Monday for some markets)
European markets may be closed (Easter Monday) — thin liquidity in metals
MSTR momentum — up 33% in 3 weeks, watch for continuation or profit-taking
Gold near ATH $4,820 — JPM Q4 target $5,055. Watch for breakout above $4,880
overnight_risks: Strait of Hormuz: ceasefire on brink of collapse (CNBC Apr 20). Oil could spike 10%+ on resumption
KelpDAO: $292M exploit still unwinding. ETH DeFi TVL dropped $6.4B. Further liquidation cascades possible.
ETH ETF outflows: 5th consecutive month. Structural selling pressure.
Thin Easter Monday liquidity could amplify moves in gold/silver.
Iran declared Hormuz open on Apr 17 (oil -12%), but Apr 20 showed renewed attacks. Binary outcome risk.

instrument_news.XAG-USD: Failed $83 breakout, back to $79.84. 5th consecutive annual supply deficit (95M oz). Forecast $88.92 by Apr 23 (algorithmic). COT: speculators net long 23,562 contracts (moderate). Gold/silver ratio compression thesis intact.
instrument_news.XAU-USD: ATH territory at $4,819. JPM targets $5,055 by Q4 2026. SSGA base case $4,750-5,500. COT: speculators added 4,641 longs, cut 1,580 shorts (increasingly bullish). Central bank buying continues.
instrument_news.BTC-USD: Consolidating at $75.9K. On-chain healthy: MVRV 1.37 (mid-cycle), SOPR 1.00, NUPL 0.65 (belief territory). ETF inflows $18.7B YTD. Technical mixed: 13 bullish vs 15 bearish indicators. Key resistance $76,950-$77,500.
instrument_news.ETH-USD: At $2,319, still -10.22% below forecasts. KelpDAO exploit (Apr 19-20) causing DeFi contagion. AAVE -30%. ETH Foundation staking 69,500 ETH (reducing sell pressure). US-Iran peace talks briefly lifted sentiment. Fear index 29.
instrument_news.MSTR: At $164-168. Holdings now 780,897 BTC ($59B). TD Cowen PT $385. Up 33% in 3 weeks on $1B BTC purchase. Behaves as leveraged BTC play.

metals_outlook: Strongly bullish. Gold at ATH with central banks buying record pace, JPM/SSGA forecasts $5,000+. Silver supply deficit deepening (5th year), industrial demand from solar/EV/AI accelerating. Gold/silver ratio still elevated — compression to 50-60 would put silver at $80-96. COT shows speculators moderately positioned (not extreme). Easter Monday thin liquidity could create volatility. Watch for silver to retest $83 breakout level.
oil_outlook: Extreme binary risk. Strait of Hormuz crisis (largest supply disruption in history per IEA) created $30+/bbl premium. Ceasefire announced but renewed tensions Apr 20. If ceasefire holds: oil back to $85-90. If collapses: could spike to $128+ again. Goldman Sachs flagged two-way risks. WTI $85-95, Brent $90-100 current range.
sentiment_shift: Fear & Greed at 29 (Fear). Mixed signals: crypto recovering from tariff shock, DeFi exploit creating contagion anxiety, oil ceasefire relief offset by renewed tensions. Gold/silver as safe havens remain bid. Overall: cautiously bearish risk assets, strongly bullish precious metals.
